name: hermes-insights
description: Query the Hermes data warehouse (Amazon Redshift) through governed, access-scoped, read-only SQL, and search the knowledge base attached to each schema for metric definitions. Bundles the hermes-analyst skill that takes a plain-language question all the way to validated results or a dashboard — looking up what each metric means via search_knowledge_base before it computes — plus the connection to the hermes-warehouse MCP server.
